Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Mitsuru... That section won't be covered on the exam.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh... Sorry. I'm having some difficulty concentrating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Guess that's to be expected with everything going on... I'm not immune to it either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Sorry, {f 4 1}. I know we're the ones who invited you to study, but... Well, just look at us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Heh... We're making you worry, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Definitely feels like we're the ones getting the most worked up about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I do understand that... But not everyone can carry themselves like you do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}But I suppose as your senpais, we should be showing you a little more dignity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You're so relaxed, it's almost scary.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If you're hiding how you really feel, I'd say you're doing a good job of it. But in your case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Yes, I doubt it's an act. This is just who he is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Well, we can't let ourselves be outdone, now can we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Rain or shine, this is still the last exam we'll ever take as high school students. All the more reason to give it our all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You're right—there's no excuse for slacking. It's time to prove what these last three years have led up to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Ooh, I see the fire in your eyes. At this rate, I may have to relinquish my position as top student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}That said, test results are but a single measure. What truly matters is that we continue to improve ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}May we both make this a triumphant finale to our time here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Sorry for causing you concern. Rest assured, we're both in the right mindset now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Heh, and who's the one who stoked the flames? I expect you'll see this study session through to make up for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Well, I think we've dallied enough. We'll need to make up for lost time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense a strong motivation[n]from Mitsuru and Sanada...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I'm focusing better than usual...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Whoa... Didn't realize so much time had passed. Guess I was in the zone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I don't think I've been able to focus this well in a long while. I've just finished reviewing the material.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Serious? Heh, not even close. But I guess that means we've earned a bit of your respect back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Heh, that so? Well, I guess that means we've earned a bit of your respect back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}We're almost through this. Keep at it, you two.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Cool, guess that's that. Now all we gotta do is ace the exams.[n]{f 1 1}
